raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py", "issue": "Missing consent verification for health data in assessment flow despite GDPR Art. 9 implications for energy_level tracking.", "recommended_fix": "Add explicit consent flag for health data in StartAssessmentRequest and validate it before storing energy_level."}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/app/globals.css", "issue": "Animation duration for non-decorative elements exceeds 800ms, violating Constitution Law 4 (Animation Safety).", "recommended_fix": "Update all animation durations in globals.css to max 800ms, ensure prefers-reduced-motion is respected."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Unmitigated legal and UX risks in core assessment flow.", "next_files_to_read": ["apps/api/app/schemas/assessment.py", "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md"]}

findings.issue: Missing consent verification for health data in assessment flow despite GDPR Art. 9 implications for energy_level tracking.
findings.recommended_fix: Add explicit consent flag for health data in StartAssessmentRequest and validate it before storing energy_level.

findings.issue: Animation duration for non-decorative elements exceeds 800ms, violating Constitution Law 4 (Animation Safety).
findings.recommended_fix: Update all animation durations in globals.css to max 800ms, ensure prefers-reduced-motion is respected.

whistleblower_flag: Unmitigated legal and UX risks in core assessment flow.
